title: 達成ッ！素晴らしき大偉業！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm summoned out of the blue to the
director's office.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: 's performance has been the definition of exhilarating! Positively tremendous! Groundbreaking!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Well done! Your grand achievement will go down in the annals of Tracen Academy—nay, in all of Umamusume history!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Director Akikawa lavishes me with immense
praise, face-to-face! It sounds like we've achieved
the best possible result!
